chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-34 / 2026 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTIONS For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 13.02.2026. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Baloch, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kamran Ahmed Khan, AAG. Mr. Maqsood Ali Baloch, Advocate for Respondent. SIP Ghulam Mustafa P.S. Gulberg. SIP Misad Ahmed, P.S. Pir Jo Goth. Mst. Murada Khatoon Petitioner No. 1. Rashid S/O Adyal Petitioner No. 2 present in Court. Meer Hassan Respondent No. 6 present in Court. ___________________ Mr. Maqsood Ali Baloch filed Vakalatnama on behalf of private Respondents which is taken on record. Official Respondents No. 3 & 4 have filed comments / report which are also taken on record. It has been contended by learned Counsel appearing for the Petitioners that both the Petitioners have married out of their freewill and previously Petitioner No. 1 was marred to Respondent No. 6 who has been subjecting her to intimidation and harassment ever since she has obtained Khula from him. Learned Counsel for Respondent No. 6 and Respondent No. 6 who has appeared in person has undertaken that he shall not intimidate or harass either of the Petitioners. With that undertaking this present Petition has served its purpose and disposed of. J U D G E Arshad/
